titleStmt.title: SII 18.291: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 291. (B.K. No. 4 of 1933-34.) BANKĀPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of the Government Farm Office.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kīrtidēva and records a gift of tax on gardens (tōṇṭa-suṁka) made by the king, Kāḷaladēvi and Mahāpradhāna Kumāra-Mallarasa at the request of Malliyapa-Danḍanāyaka, the Suṅkavergaḍe of Hānuṁgal Five hundred. The gift was made to the temple of Indrēśvaradēva at the capital town of Bamkāpura and was entrusted to Śivaśakti-Paṇḍita, son of Sōmarāvuḷa-Paṇḍita.

On the ground of palaeography and the fact that Kāḷaladēvi of the present record is mentioned in the previous inscription (No. 290) of Kīrtidēva II Kīrtidēva of this record may be dentified with Kīrtidēva II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍa
ḷēśvaraṁ banavāsīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ jayaṁtī madhukēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasādaṁ mriga madāmōdaṁ tryakṣakṣmāsaṁbhavaṁ caturāsītinagarādhiṣṭhitalalāṭalō
canaṁ caturbhuja jagadviditāṣṭādaśāśvamēdhayajñadīkṣādīkṣita himavadugirīṁdra ruṁdraśikhariśikharasaṁsthāpitasphaṭikaśiḷāstaṁbhabaddhamadagajamahāmahi
mābhirāmaṁ kādaṁbacakṛma yūravarmmamahāmahīpāḷakuḷabhūśaṇaṁ permmaṭṭitū ryyanirgghōśaṇaṁ śākhācarēṁdra
dhvajavirājamānamānōttuṁgasiṁghalāṁchanaṁ dattārtthikāṁcanaṁ samarajayakāraṇaṁ kadaṁbarābharaṇaṁ mārkkoḷvavara gaṁḍaṁ
pracaṁḍamārttaṁḍaṁ bhujabaḷabhīma satyarādhēyaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kīrtti dēvarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . v® . bhujabaḷabhīmanugrataravāriyapōyoḷe (?) birdda bhūparaṁ gijigijiyāgi satta nijavājiya beṁ
noḷe nilsi rāgadiṁ vijayagabhīrabhērininadaṁgaḷiveṁbinavārddu suttaluṁ gajaṟuva bhūtakōṭiya bhayāvahamādu
du yuddhabhūtaḷaṁ . tatupādapadmōpajīvi . Olladaranikki nijabhujaballāḷtanadiṁdavakha� mahimōṁnatiyaṁ sallali
tōraṁtāḷdida mallarasaṁ dhuradoḷariyanāriṁ piriya ... tatpādapadmōpajīvi . Ārjjavananadhikanaṁ kaḍudurjjananaṁ bēḍadeyda bē
ḍavo budhanāgārjjunanippaṁtevolirddaṁ kerjjuṁkada prabhuvenipa mallidēvaṁ jagadoḻu Intu hānuṁgallayinū
ṟaṟa suṁkadadhikāri lakṣmīgadhīśvaranāgi śrīrājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ baṁkāpurada śrīmadiṁdrē śvaradēvarācāryyaru svasti .
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁ naruṁ sakaḷabudhajana
prasaṁnaruṁ dharmmalatādhāradaṁḍaruṁ nirmmaḷavācāpracaṁḍaruṁ satyavārkkamaḷinī mārttaṁḍaruṁ sakaḷaśāstrāṁga
vicāracaturaruṁ sāhityavidyādhararuṁ saṁsāranirataruṁ cāritracaritaruṁ Atītānāga tavarttamānaprati
bōdhakaruṁ . kavikōṭicāturaṁgadvaṁdvayuddhapravīṇaruṁ śrīmadakkōṭiya kumāraṁ bhūbaḻacakravartti sōma
rāvuḷapaṁḍitadēvaru . tatputraṁ śivaśaktipaṁḍitadēvara prabhutvaveṁteṁdaḍe . Indra suradhēnuvene kaivandasurō
rvvījanikaramane mige hūraṁbaṁdeseva siddharasamene vandige śivaśaktidēvamunipaṁ kuḍuvaṁ ... svasti śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kīrttidēvarasaruṁ kāḷaladēviyaruṁ mahāpradhānaṁ kumāra mallarasanuṁ dharmmakathānurāgadiṁdirddalli suṁ
kaverggaḍe malliyaṇadaṁḍanāyakaṁ savineyadiṁ binnapaṁgeyyalu . dharaṇīnāriya vaktradaṁte banavāsi dēśavenduṁ
niraṁtara śōbhāspadavalli kuṁbotpedirkkuṁ pānuṁgalla nāḍu sundara śōbhōttama madakke mūgenisuguṁ baṁ
kāpuraṁ paṭṭaṇaṁ tatpurābharaṇaṁ tānenaliṁdravallabhaśivāvāsaṁ jaganmaṇḍanaṁ . Intenisi diṁdrēśvara(drēśvara) dēvaThese letters are scored out.
ra naṁdādīvigege tōṁṭada suṁkamumaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāravāgi śivaśaktipaṁḍita dēvargge dhārāpū
rvvakaṁmāḍi biṭṭariṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁgātīravāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgārgchyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ
sāyirakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭisi sāsirvva caturvvēda pāragarappa brāhmaṇarggubhayamu
khidānamaṁ koṭṭa phaḷamakku . Idanaḷidātanā puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāyira kavileyumanā sāsi
rvva brāhmaṇarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakku . © . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundha
rāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarśasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . maṁgaḷaṁ mahā śrī śrī śrī ...
Digital edition of SII 18.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
